long_description:
[TEL] fluentbit-logs pod down alert is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/tel-fluentbit-logs-pod-down.html
TIP Situation:fluentbit-logs pod down
TIP Short Description:[TEL] fluentbit-logs pods have not been running in mzone736 for the past 2 hours
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:::mzone736:daemonset:fluentbit-logs

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    avg by (kube_cluster_name,kube_daemonset_name)((max by (kube_cluster_name,kube_daemonset_name)(kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled{kube_daemonset_name="fluentbit-logs"})) - (sum by (kube_cluster_name,kube_daemonset_name)(kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready{kube_daemonset_name="fluentbit-logs"}))) > 0 = 1
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone736' and kube_daemonset_name = 'fluentbit-logs'

Time:             12/03/2025 07:58 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179384089%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [TEL] fluentbit-logs pod down alert
Description:  fluentbit-logs daemonset pods have not been running for the past 2 hours
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   avg by (kube_cluster_name,kube_daemonset_name)((max by (kube_cluster_name,kube_daemonset_name)(kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled{kube_daemonset_name="fluentbit-logs"})) - (sum by (kube_cluster_name,kube_daemonset_name)(kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready{kube_daemonset_name="fluentbit-logs"}))) > 0
Duration: 2 h
Alert URL:    https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D1123188
